Storybook

Components

Browse the Storyhouse design system component library. Each component is production-ready with comprehensive testing, accessibility, and documentation.

Button

Stable

Versatile button component with multiple variants, sizes, and states. Supports loading, icons, and full-width layouts.

4 variants 3 sizes

Card

Stable

Flexible card container for grouping related content. Composable sub-components for header, title, content, and footer.

4 variants 4 sub-components

Input

Stable

Form input with labels, validation states, icons, and accessibility built in. Supports error, helper text, and icon slots.

3 sizes ARIA native

Badge

Stable

Small status indicators for counts, labels, and states. Supports variants, dot indicators, and removable tags.

6 variants Removable

Avatar

Stable

User avatar with image, initials fallback, and deterministic color generation. Five sizes, two shapes.

5 sizes 2 shapes

Checkbox

Stable

Form input for selection with support for individual and grouped checkboxes, indeterminate states, and validation.

4 variants 3 sizes

Select

Stable

Styled select dropdown with option groups, validation states, and keyboard navigation.

4 variants Grouped options

Tabs

Stable

Tab navigation for organizing content into switchable panels. Supports icons, badges, and pills variant.

2 variants Icons + badges

Modal

Stable

Modal dialog for focused interactions. Supports sizes, variants, loading state, and ConfirmModal.

5 variants 6 sizes

Toast

Stable

Non-intrusive notification messages that auto-dismiss. Supports success, error, warning, and info types.

4 types Hook API

Tooltip

Stable

Hover tooltip with four positions and configurable delay for contextual information display.

4 positions 500ms delay

Pagination

Stable

Navigate large datasets with page numbers, page size control, and compact variant.

2 variants Ellipsis truncation

Data Table

Stable

Feature-rich data table with sorting, selection, expandable rows, striped mode, and custom rendering.

Sortable Selectable rows

Empty State

Stable

Flexible empty state for no data, no results, errors, permission denials, and loading with optional actions.

5 variants Action buttons

File Upload

Stable

Drag-and-drop file uploader with validation, preview thumbnails, and multi-file support.

Drag & drop File validation

Error Boundary

Stable

React error boundary for gracefully handling rendering errors with customizable fallback UI.

Class component Custom fallback

Interactive Playground

Try each component live with all props and variants in our Storybook instance.

Open Storybook
ESC
Type to search components, guides, tokens, and more…

Storyhouse Design System

Built for scale, precision, and exceptional developer experience.
